residual_risks: The target plan is currently untracked in git status, so it is not durable GitHub handoff evidence until intentionally added to a branch/PR.

If the plan leads to runtime documentation, skill, agent, validator, or eval changes, the later implementation must add tests/evals/validators first and run the applicable AGENTS.md gates before PR readiness.

This review did not prove live OpenClaw/OrbStack pod behavior, GitHub branch protection, EAS, Stitch, mobile-mcp device behavior, Jira, or Confluence state; the reviewed plan correctly treats those as external proof surfaces.
